features: CLASSIC DESIGN: The design has a nostalgic feel, yet still features the modern essentials such as an earphone socket and access to the latest AM/FM/LW radio stations. The compact size, complete with telescopic swivel antenna and fold-flat carry handle offer a portable radio great for your home or to take out and about.

EASY TO USE: The simple design allows for easy set-up and operation, suitable for all to enjoy. Tune into your favourite stations by searching on the tuner for different frequencies and watching the tuning window. Twist the rotary turning dial on the side of the radio to search between stations and the smaller dial underneath to adjust the volume level.

SPEAKER OR EARPHONES: This radio has an earphone socket and comes complete with a pair of stereo earphones. Use the built in speaker to enjoy listening or alternatively plug in the included earphones for private listening.

PORTABLE WITH CARRY HANDLE: The LLOYTRON ‘Sports’ 3 Band Personal Sports Radio is small and light enough to transport, making it ideal for taking away with you on trips or into the garden. Extend the telescopic antenna for better reception of radio signals.
BATTERY OPERATED: To power, simply insert 2 x AA batteries (not included). Use your personal sports radio wirelessly without the need to plug in or recharge.
description: From the manufacturer This personal sports radio is a compact and versatile device that allows you to stay connected to your favourite stations wherever you go. This radio features 3 bands - AM, FM, and LW - ensuring a wide range of radio stations to choose from. With its telescopic antenna, you can enjoy clear and uninterrupted reception, no matter where you are. To power up your personal sports radio, simply insert 2 x AA batteries, ensuring you always have access to your favourite stations. Whether you're sitting in your garden, enjoying at the beach, or relaxing at home, this radio will keep you entertained and connected to your preferred programming. The earphone socket and included earphones provide a personalised listening experience, allowing you to enjoy your favourite shows or music privately. Designed with portability in mind, this sports radio comes with an integral fold-flat carry handle, making it easy to take along on outdoor adventures or to the gym. This classic and compact battery-operated radio has been packaged in an elegantly designed box that showcases all the essential product specifications. This timeless radio is crafted for those who appreciate simplicity and reliability in their audio experience. Unbox the charm and reliability of our classic and compact battery-operated radio
